content.en:
"Watersheds are so rare that even if the Fivefold Ancestors go to look for them, they may not be able to find them. If a river basin is publicized, there will definitely be a fourfold ancestor who will come here and snatch the river basin away!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, he determined the specific location of the river basin, and then built the space-time channel through the space-time limit pole, so as to escape into the river basin.

The watershed is different from the original domain, the location of the original domain is fixed, and the spatio-temporal fluctuations are stable, while the spatio-temporal fluctuations of the watershed are too unstable, which means that the coordinates are changing all the time, so it is difficult to enter.

Unless you wait until the channel for the watershed to collide with the original domain is completely opened, you can easily enter the watershed.

But at that time, it would be a step too late to enter.

Therefore, Ye Tian needs to enter the watershed in advance.

Time passed slowly, and finally Ye Tian successfully locked the space-time coordinates of the river basin and escaped directly into it.

......

within the watershed.

As soon as Ye Tian entered here, he immediately sensed a primordial black beast with an incomparably powerful aura.

The Primordial Black Beast has wisdom and knows how to cooperate, and when it encounters enemies together, the Primordial Black Beast will go on together, which is one of the reasons why the Primordial Black Beast is terrible.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's copying talent enveloped the audience, sensing the talent of these primordial black beasts, and also roughly knowing their strength.

"Fortunately, the strength of the primordial black beasts in this river basin is not too strong!"

Ye Tian said happily, if it was the top-notch river basin, it would not even dare to provoke the Quadruple Ancestor!

Bang!!!!

The battle is on!

Ye Tian went all out, and the Will Pagoda was summoned to protect his whole body, and the power of the Extreme Extreme Dao burst out.

Puff puff!!!

A Primordial Black Beast of the Triple Ancestor level was killed by Ye Tian and died under his Primordial Black Light.

And those ordinary ancestor-level primordial black beasts were directly shattered by Ye Tian's power, like ants being slaughtered with a wave of their hands.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian was besieged and killed by a large number of primordial black beasts, but they just couldn't help Ye Tian.

Gradually, there were more and more corpses of the Primordial Black Beast, and fewer and fewer Primordial Black Beasts survived.

After a long time, all the primordial black beasts were killed.

And Ye Tian's power was consumed a lot, and even the Pagoda of Will was dim.

However, he won.

"It's not easy, even I have been killing for so long to kill this group of primordial black beasts, if I really let these primordial black beasts rush into the end of the realm, I am afraid that the end of the realm will be destroyed, I will not be able to kill them all. Fortunately, I came in early, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to protect those cultivators at the end of the realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to collect the resources here, which took him a lot of time.

After the resources were harvested, Ye Tian began to collect this river basin.

The Primordial Black Beast of the River Basin has been destroyed, so it is easy to collect it.

You only need to use the Extreme Extreme Dao to devour the origin of the river basin, and after refining it, you can directly store the entire river basin.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian quickly sensed the origin of the river basin, and many extreme extreme paths on his body began to invade the origin of the river basin, refining it little by little.

Since no one bothered Ye Tian, the refining process was very smooth.

this day.

The entire river basin was completely refined by Ye Tian.

"Close!"

The huge river basin was instantly collected by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's body also returned to the original Black Sea.

"It's successful, then you only need to gather the thirty-three extreme extreme paths corresponding to the holy art of the glazed holy cover, and you can cultivate the glazed holy cover!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian exchanged the Glass Holy Cover for the Holy Technique from the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and knew the thirty-three extreme extreme paths of this Holy Technique.

"I already have twenty-seven of these Extreme Poles, and I'm only six Extreme Extremes away!"

Ye Tian smiled.

In this way, it won't be long before he can really practice the Glass Sacred Cover.

After practicing this secret art, his strength will improve a lot, although the attack power is not good, but the life-saving ability is more powerful than many fourfold ancestors, and it can be of great use at critical moments!

For example, in some extremely dangerous forbidden places, the Quadruple Ancestor did not dare to enter them, but he could enter them, and he could also obtain benefits!

In addition, he can also copy his body, and with the glass holy cover, he can really go to some forbidden places.

......

The End of the World.

"Lord of the Boundary, the matter of the river basin, I have taken care of it, let those pseudo-primordial ancestors and primordial ancestors at the end of the realm not have to worry!" Ye Tian informed the Lord of the Unbounded.

"The watershed is done?"

The Unbounded Lord couldn't believe it.

Immediately, he entered the primordial Black Sea and sensed the breath of the river basin.

As a result, he couldn't sense the watershed.

"The watershed is missing?"

The Unbounded Lord was amazed.

According to his understanding, when the river basin hits the original domain, it will be like a needle, directly penetrating through the original domain, and then disappearing!

And in the process, everything in the Primordial Realm will be destroyed by those Primordial Black Beasts.

But now, the river basin is suddenly gone, and it has not penetrated the end of the world.

Obviously, Ye Tian got rid of the primordial black beast in the river basin, and how did he use to make the river basin leave.

The Lord of the Boundless didn't know the holy art of the Glass Sacred Cover, otherwise he would have known that Ye Tian had collected the river basin.

The watershed was gone, and the Lord of the Golden Body breathed a sigh of relief.

And more of the pseudo-primordial ancestors didn't feel anything at all, after all, they didn't really see the river basin, and they didn't see those primordial black beasts.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to comprehend the ultimate path of a gate.

With the resources from the river basin, Ye Tian's cultivation speed accelerated again.

After dozens of Origin Realm Eras, Ye Tian successfully comprehended the three Extreme Extreme Dao, and then engraved the black characters represented by these three Extreme Extreme Dao onto the Pagoda of Will.

At this point, the seventy-two floors of Ye Tian's Will Pagoda were all engraved with the Extreme Extreme Dao.

Rumble!!!!

The Pagoda of Will fed back the Extreme Dao Will, making Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Will increase again.

Subsequently, Ye Tian could continue to condense the Will Pagoda.

Seventy-three floors!

Seventy-four floors!

Seventy-five floors!

When Ye Tian condensed to the one hundred and eighth layer, he could no longer condense the Will Pagoda.

Moreover, Ye Tian found that his Extreme Dao Will was almost condensed a few more layers and there was no way to continue to condense it, even if he could continue to condense the Will Pagoda in the future, he would have to find more Primordial Spirit Sacred Fruits and more precious treasures to improve his Extreme Dao Will.

"Next, continue to comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao, comprehend one hundred and eight Extreme Extreme Dao, and then engrave all of them on the Pagoda of Will!" Ye Tian planned.

Of course, he now needs to comprehend certain three extreme extreme paths, gather the thirty-three extreme extreme paths of cultivating the glazed holy cover, and then practice the holy art of the glazed holy cover.

That's the most important thing right now!
